title: Instacart Market and Customer Analysis
description: Processed and structured massive datasets from CSV files into a local SQLite database utilizing Python, laying the groundwork for complex SQL analysis of product association rules.
highlights: Engineered high-performance SQL queries utilizing CTEs and advanced JOINs.
Extracted key business metrics calculating reorder rates and peak shopping hours.

title: TikTok EDA
description: Conducted Exploratory Data Analysis on a dataset of 19k TikTok videos to investigate engagement patterns and content moderation.
highlights: Engineered features from text data and visualized correlations.
Revealed that 'claim' content drives higher engagement but correlates with a 3x higher ban rate.

title: Tree and Money in NYC
description: Analyzed and visualized urban forestry data for New York City to identify patterns in tree concentration, health, and income correlations.
highlights: Developed an interactive dashboard showcasing key metrics like tree health across different income levels.
Communicated complex data relationships through clear geographic maps.

title: Twitch Influence On Game Popularity
description: Performed exploratory data analysis and applied regression models to quantify the influence of streaming popularity on game sales and ratings.
highlights: Collected, cleaned, and merged datasets using Python (Pandas, NumPy) and APIs from Twitch.
Visualized insights through interactive dashboards using Matplotlib, Seaborn, and Plotly.

title: Modern PC Component Catalog
description: Created a structured catalog of modern PC components—such as processors, graphics cards, and memory—to simulate a realistic custom PC building experience and optimize compatibility.
